remedies.remedy_desc: Panax ginseng creams have been found to help with premature ejaculation in some men. This is because ginseng is a natural herb that helps improve blood flow to the penis. When blood flow increases, it can help men last longer during sex. Ginseng also helps to reduce stress and anxiety, which can trigger premature ejaculation. remedies.remedy_preparation: To make Valeriana officinalis herbal creams that help with premature ejaculation, start by gathering the necessary ingredients. You will need dried Valerian root, beeswax, coconut oil, shea butter, vitamin E oil, and a small saucepan. Begin by infusing the dried Valerian root in a carrier oil, such as coconut oil, in a double boiler for 2-3 hours. This process will help to extract the root's active compounds, including valerenic acid and isovaleric acid, which have been shown to have a calming effect on the body. Once the infusion is complete, strain the oil and discard the solids. In a separate saucepan, melt the beeswax and shea butter over low heat. Add the infused oil, vitamin E oil, and a few drops of essential oil (such as lavender) to the melted wax mixture. Stir well to combine and pour the mixture into a small tin or jar. Allow the cream to cool and solidify before use. To apply, gently massage a small amount into the penis and surrounding area before intimacy. The Valeriana officinalis cream may help to promote relaxation and slow down the ejaculation process, potentially improving overall performance and pleasure.

remedies.remedy_desc: Ginkgo biloba cream is used to help men who have premature ejaculation. This condition happens when a man ejaculates sooner than he wants to during sex. Ginkgo biloba cream works by improving blood flow to the penis. When blood flows well to the penis, it gets harder and stays harder for longer. This helps the man to delay ejaculation.  Ginkgo biloba has a chemical called flavonoids, which helps to calm the nerves. Nerves can make a man ejaculate quickly, so when they are calm, it gives him more control over his ejaculation. Some men also use Ginkgo biloba cream because it can help to reduce anxiety and stress. When a man is less anxious and stressed, he can think more clearly and have more control over his body.  Ginkgo biloba cream is easy to apply and can be used before sex. It is usually applied to the head of the penis and the base of the penis. It starts to work quickly, so the man can try to delay his ejaculation within 15-30 minutes. Ginkgo biloba cream can be used alone or with other treatments to help men with premature ejaculation.
remedies.remedy_preparation: To make Valeriana officinalis herbal creams for premature ejaculation, you'll need dried valerian root, a carrier oil such as coconut or olive oil, beeswax, and a few other natural ingredients. First, dry the valerian root in a low-temperature oven or a dehydrator to remove excess moisture. Next, make a valerian root infusion by steeping the dried root in hot water for several hours, then straining the mixture to extract the active ingredients. Combine the valerian root infusion with your carrier oil in a ratio of about 1:4, and heat the mixture gently to help the valerian root dissolve into the oil. Once the mixture has cooled, add a small amount of beeswax to help thicken the cream and give it a longer shelf life. Finally, add a few drops of a natural preservative, such as vitamin E oil, to help prevent spoilage and extend the shelf life of the cream. Once the cream has cooled and thickened, you can apply it to the penis area before sex to help reduce anxiety and delay ejaculation.

remedies.remedy_desc: Eurycoma longifolia cream is a popular remedy for premature ejaculation. It contains compounds that help to delay ejaculation, giving you more control over your body. remedies.remedy_preparation: To make Valeriana officinalis herbal cream that helps with premature ejaculation, start by gathering ingredients. You'll need dried Valeriana root, coconut oil, shea butter, beeswax, vitamin E oil, and a carrier oil like olive or jojoba oil. First, mix 2 tablespoons of dried Valeriana root with 2 cups of boiling water, and let it steep for 10-15 minutes to create a strong tea. Strain the mixture and let it cool. Next, in a separate bowl, melt 1/2 cup of coconut oil, 1/4 cup of shea butter, and 2 tablespoons of beeswax in a double boiler or a microwave-safe bowl in short intervals, stirring between each interval. Once the mixture is smooth, add 10 drops of vitamin E oil and 2 tablespoons of the Valeriana tea, and stir well. Finally, add 1/4 cup of a carrier oil and mix until you get a smooth and thick cream. Pour the cream into a glass jar and store it in the fridge for up to 2 weeks. To use, apply a small amount to the penis and massage it in before sex. This cream may help slow down ejaculation and improve overall sexual performance.

remedies.remedy_preparation: To make Valeriana officinalis herbal creams that help with premature ejaculation, you will need dried Valerian root, a carrier oil like coconut or olive oil, beeswax, and a few other natural ingredients. First, steep 1-2 tablespoons of dried Valerian root in 1 cup of carrier oil for 2-3 weeks, shaking the mixture daily to allow the roots' active compounds to infuse into the oil. After the infusion period, strain the oil through a cheesecloth or a coffee filter into a clean container, discarding the solids. Next, melt 2-3 tablespoons of beeswax in a double boiler or a heat-proof bowl set over a pot of simmering water. Once the beeswax is fully melted, slowly pour the infused oil into the melted wax, stirring constantly to prevent separation. Continue stirring until the mixture thickens and turns into a smooth, creamy texture. Finally, add a few drops of a natural preservative like vitamin E oil or grapefruit seed extract, and pour the Valeriana officinalis cream into a clean, sterilized container. This herbal cream can be applied topically to the penis to help reduce anxiety and stress, which are common causes of premature ejaculation, and promote a more sustained and pleasurable sexual experience.

remedies.remedy_preparation: To make Valeriana officinalis herbal creams that help with premature ejaculation, start by gathering the necessary ingredients. You will need 2 tablespoons of dried valerian root and 1 cup of carrier oil, such as coconut or olive oil, to infuse the herb. remedies.remedy_desc: Valeriana officinalis cream is often used to help men with premature ejaculation. remedies.remedy_preparation: To make Valeriana officinalis herbal creams that help with premature ejaculation, start by drying a sufficient amount of valerian root in a low-temperature oven or by air-drying it. Once dry, grind the valerian root into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle. Next, combine the valerian powder with a carrier oil such as coconut or jojoba oil in a heat-resistant bowl, and gently heat the mixture over low heat or in a double boiler. Stir the mixture occasionally until it reaches a temperature of around 160°F to 180°F, then remove it from the heat and let it cool. Once cooled, add a thickening agent such as beeswax or candelilla wax to the mixture, stirring well to combine. Pour the mixture into small jars or containers, and let it cool and solidify completely before use. The resulting cream can be applied topically to the penis area to help reduce stress and anxiety, promoting a longer and more satisfying sexual experience.

intro_desc: Herbal creams can be a helpful solution for men experiencing premature ejaculation. This issue can lead to feelings of frustration, low self-esteem, and relationship problems. Fixing premature ejaculation can improve one's life by increasing confidence and intimacy with a partner.  Premature ejaculation can be treated with herbal creams containing certain herbs. For example, Panax ginseng, also known as Asian ginseng, is a natural stress-reliever that can help reduce anxiety and increase endurance during intimacy. This is due to its adaptogenic properties, which help the body adapt to stress and maintain balance. Ginkgo biloba, on the other hand, is known to improve blood flow and reduce inflammation. By increasing blood flow to the penis, Ginkgo biloba can help prolong ejaculation and enhance sexual performance.  The combination of these two herbs in an herbal cream can be beneficial for men experiencing premature ejaculation. The cream can be applied topically to the penis before intimacy, allowing the herbs to absorb and take effect. This can provide a natural and non-invasive solution to the problem, without the risk of side effects associated with prescription medications.
supplementary_best: Combining Eurycoma longifolia with Withania somnifera and Valeriana officinalis in a herbal cream may help remedy premature ejaculation. Eurycoma longifolia, also known as Tongkat Ali, is a natural aphrodisiac that can increase testosterone levels and improve sexual performance. Withania somnifera, or Ashwagandha, is an adaptogenic herb that helps reduce anxiety and stress, allowing for better control over ejaculation. Valeriana officinalis, or Valerian root, can also help calm the nervous system, reducing anxiety and increasing blood flow to the genitals.  The combination of these three herbs is effective because they address different aspects of premature ejaculation. Eurycoma longifolia increases testosterone, Withania somnifera reduces anxiety, and Valeriana officinalis calms the nervous system. This combination can help improve sexual performance by increasing libido, reducing anxiety, and promoting relaxation. It's essential to note that individual results may vary, and it's recommended to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
supplementary_avoid: If you have premature ejaculation, there are some herbal creams you should avoid using. One of these is containing 'Yohimbe', as it can increase heart rate and blood pressure, which can worsen the condition. Another is 'Maca', as it may stimulate the nervous system and cause more frequent erections, which can lead to premature ejaculation. 'Ashwagandha' cream should also be avoided, as high doses can cause anxiety and stress, which can contribute to premature ejaculation. Additionally, 'Tribulus terrestris' cream may not be suitable, as it can increase testosterone levels, which can sometimes worsen premature ejaculation symptoms.
supplementary_other_remedies: Some natural remedies that may help with premature ejaculation include omega-3 rich foods like salmon and walnuts, which contain fatty acids that help with blood flow and nerve function. Eating foods that are high in antioxidants, such as berries and leafy greens, can also be beneficial because they help reduce inflammation in the body. Exercise, particularly yoga and Pilates, can help men relax and manage stress, which is a common cause of premature ejaculation. Acupuncture has also been used to help men with premature ejaculation by stimulating certain points on the body that help calm the nervous system. Drinking enough water is essential, as dehydration can lead to increased anxiety and stress levels. A diet rich in complex carbohydrates, such as whole grains and vegetables, can also help regulate blood sugar levels and reduce symptoms of premature ejaculation. Reducing caffeine and nicotine intake can also help, as these substances can increase heart rate and anxiety levels.
supplementary_related_ailments: People with premature ejaculation may also experience other health issues due to related factors. One common issue is low sperm count, which can be caused by stress and anxiety related to premature ejaculation. Herbs like ashwagandha, ginseng, and rhodiola rosea can help reduce stress and improve fertility.  Another issue is erectile dysfunction (ED), which can be caused by a decrease in blood flow to the penis. The herb yohimbe, which improves blood flow, may help alleviate ED.  People with premature ejaculation may also experience anxiety and depression. Herbs like St. John's Wort, which has been used to treat mild to moderate depression, may help alleviate these symptoms.  Low testosterone levels, which can cause fatigue and low sex drive, are also common in people with premature ejaculation. The herb tribulus terrestris may help increase testosterone levels.  Additionally, people with premature ejaculation may experience sleep disorders like insomnia, which can be caused by stress and anxiety. Herbs like valerian root, which promotes relaxation and sleep, may help improve sleep quality.
